diagnosis: Moderate to severe rheumatoid arthritis or plaque psoriasis

required_criteria.description: Documented diagnosis of moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis or plaque psoriasis.
Trial and failure of at least one conventional DMARD or systemic therapy (step therapy).
Negative tuberculosis (TB) screening prior to initiating therapy.
Prescribed by or in consultation with a rheumatologist or dermatologist.

contraindications.description: Active sepsis or serious active infection.

supporting_evidence: ACR Guideline for the Treatment of Rheumatoid Arthritis (simplified)
